title: Final commercial rehearsal and evidence pack
scope: Added a local final evidence-pack generator for the Harborline rehearsal.
Evidence pack captures preflight JSON, security readiness JSON, blocked gate, passing gate, readiness certificate, certificate verification, architecture summary, limitations, and rehearsal manifest.
Added final evidence-pack documentation with rehearsal script, screenshot/video checklist, and claim boundary.
Added regression test proving the evidence pack writes all expected artifacts.
acceptance: A single command generates the final local evidence pack.
Evidence pack includes proof JSON, gate output, architecture summary, and limitations.
Rehearsal script identifies screenshots/video still needed from the UI surfaces.
Claims remain bounded to the tested Harborline scenario.
